In this social networking video, we're going to be looking at gather, which is www.gather.com. The reason why we're looking at this social network is a great way to get your content on the web and having people follow you at the end of the day if you're looking to get the social traffic. This is a great way and a great combination within one site. You can share ideas or comments or write about your niche market with articles. You can publish an article on the site. You can also publish images. You can upload images, which is always a great way of pulling people into your niche. Also, videos as well. If you want to now add video within gather.com, you can add your videos as well and get people watching your content and ultimately getting back to your niche site. As you can see here, formalexa.com gathers a rank of 9884. It's within the top 10,000 websites on the internet and it's growing all the time. The features that you have with gather means you can upload articles, images and videos. You can join groups. You can invite people. A great feature here is you can invite people through your address books, which are making it easier and easier for people to be adding their friends. It's a great time to be getting in now and starting to use this service. As you can see here, we've got join today. It's free. You can just join and sign up to get an account. We just hit the join button. Then we just need to go through adding our first name, last name, location where we are. Create a username, password, confirm your password, email and then you need to put in the verification word here. Agree to the terms and conditions and hit submit. As you can see once you've entered your details, it says thanks for registering to activate your account, confirm your email address and it basically sends an email. I need to confirm it within seven days. Otherwise your account will not be set up. So just log into email and confirm you want to set up your account. Once you've confirmed your account, they take you through the next steps. The basics, they put hometown, employers, college. You can put the information if you want to here. Or if you want, you can just skip the step and move on to your favorites and then email tools and photos. So here you want to put in your favorites. So lately what you've been listening to, what you're currently reading, last movie you watched, your must see show, any interesting activities that you have, just separate them by commas and you can put that in here as well. Then here as you can see the email tools, you can receive a notification of email and you can tick the appropriate box. So if someone pings your profile, someone comments on your content, if you receive a private message, you can also say if you get an invitation or a friend request, you can click whichever box you want. Keeping up to date, you can send me emails about gather events, contest news and updates and details or again you can skip the step or just save. And then the next step here is the call as a photo op. You can just browse and upload a photograph to be using as your icon and once you're done, you just save and finish. Once you've gone through setting up, you'll be at my gather where you can check out your friend feed so you can see what your friends are doing. Once you've added them here and their activities, you can go through the group feed and you can even do the feed me where you basically type in keywords and it will then bring you relevant content. If you want to invite your friends and this is a cool feature here, which will be great once you have other people coming because they'll be inviting their friends through this method, which means they can import people from their Hotmail account, their Gmail account, even through their Facebook profile. They can manually add email addresses or they can even search other email clients like Outlook and Exchange. As you post more content, they're notified of what's going on. Then there's also Feed Me. From here, you can actually search for other material and groups within Gather. If it's a blatant sales page, then people are probably not going to be so interested. What you want to be doing here is showing the interest in your niche or even having other people write or put content on here for you that establishes you with the credibility in your niche market.
